description: A tool to help set arm bones and hold them in place.
A tool to help set arm bones and hold them in place.  It is specifically designed to fit huge survivors.
A tool to help set arm bones and hold them in place.  It is specifically designed to fit tiny survivors.

A first aid device used to apply pressure to a limb or extremity in order to limit blood flow.  Should be employed only to manage heavy bleeding, because prolonged use will harm the limb.  It can be adjusted in size to fit different limbs.

A first aid device used to apply pressure to a limb or extremity in order to limit blood flow.  Should be employed only to manage heavy bleeding, because prolonged use will harm the limb.  It can be adjusted in size to fit different limbs.

A first aid device used to apply pressure to a limb or extremity in order to limit blood flow.  Should be employed only to manage heavy bleeding, because prolonged use will harm the limb.  It can be adjusted in size to fit different limbs.

A first aid device used to apply pressure to a limb or extremity in order to limit blood flow.  Should be employed only to manage heavy bleeding, because prolonged use will harm the limb.  It can be adjusted in size to fit different limbs.

A first aid device used to apply pressure to a limb or extremity in order to limit blood flow.  Should be employed only to manage heavy bleeding, because prolonged use will harm the limb.  It can be adjusted in size to fit different limbs.

A first aid device used to apply pressure to a limb or extremity in order to limit blood flow.  Should be employed only to manage heavy bleeding, because prolonged use will harm the limb.  It can be adjusted in size to fit different limbs.
A crude eye covering woven from blades of grass with string attached to fasten it.  Useful for sleeping in bright areas.  Use to raise it.
A crude eye covering woven from blades of grass with string attached to fasten it.  It's currently raised, letting you see.  Use to lower it.

//: A folded bandana still takes up some space on the head.
description: A simple fabric covering tied over the eyes to block sight.  Useful for sleeping in bright areas.  Use to raise it.
A simple fabric covering tied over the eyes to block sight.  It's currently raised, letting you see.  Use to lower it.

//: A folded bandana still takes up some space on the head.
description: A simple covering tied over the eyes to block sight, made out of duct tape.  Useful for sleeping in bright areas.  Use to raise it.
A simple covering tied over the eyes to block sight, made out of duct tape.  It's currently raised, letting you see.  Use to lower it.
Industrial-grade ear plugs.  They fit inside the ears.
A huge duffel bag with a backpack attached, both packed to the gills.  Judging by the feel, a National Guardsman could have packed this to be ready for deployment.  Activate to unpack and enjoy.
A huge duffel bag with a backpack attached, both packed to the gills.  You packed this to be ready for deployment.  Activate to unpack and enjoy.
A tool to help set leg bones and hold them in place.
A tool to help set leg bones and hold them in place.  It is specifically designed to fit Huge people.
A tool to help set leg bones and hold them in place.  It is specifically designed to fit Tiny people.
A plastic mask with a very dark visor, meant to protect the entire face while welding.  It also serves as somewhat good armor, but makes it hard to see.  Activate it to push it up your head.

use_action.msg: You push your %s up your head.

description: A crude welding mask made from shaped steel.  It will keep your face safe while welding, but it's a bit less comfortable than the real deal.  Activate it to push it up your head.

use_action.msg: You push your %s up your head.

description: A crude welding mask made from shaped steel.  It's less dark than a proper welding mask, and therefore less difficult to see in, but also less protective when welding.  Activate it to lower it over your face.

use_action.msg: You lower your crude welding mask over your face.

description: A plastic mask with a very dark visor, meant to protect the entire face while welding.  It also serves as somewhat good armor, but makes it hard to see.  Activate it to lower it over your face.

use_action.msg: You lower your welding mask over your face.

description: A waterproof digital watch with a built-in electronic game system, powered by standard batteries.  Activate to play.
A touchscreen watch that comes with many uses, such as a calendar, alarm, and even a fitness app, for when you want to check your health on the go!
A fitness band that can track your heartbeat, exercise level, and calories, and also has a clock.  Activate to see your metrics.
A high-crowned, wide-brimmed, sable-colored fedora.  Its brim helps keep the sun out of your eyes.  The perfect hat for treasure hunting.
A pair of socks with internal battery-powered heating elements.  Use it to turn it on.
A pair of socks with internal battery-powered heating elements.  They are currently on, and continually draining batteries.  Use it to turn them off.
A full-body suit of thin thermal underwear equipped with internal battery-powered heating elements.  Use it to turn it on.
A full-body suit of thin thermal underwear equipped with internal battery-powered heating elements.  It is currently on, and continually draining batteries.  Use it to turn it off.
A pair of gloves with internal battery-powered heating elements.  Use it to turn it on.
A pair of gloves with internal battery-powered heating elements.  They are currently on, and continually draining batteries.  Use it to turn them off.
A snug cloth mask with internal battery-powered heating elements.  Use it to turn it on.
A snug cloth mask with internal battery-powered heating elements.  It is are currently on, and continually draining batteries.  Use it to turn it off.

A pair of optics with a neck strap attached.  Useful for seeing long distances.  Wearing this item or carrying it in your inventory will double the distance around you that is mapped during your travels.  You could also use them to focus the sunlight.
An LED headlamp with an adjustable strap so as to be comfortably worn on your head or attached to your helmet.  Use it to turn it on.

A point-and-shoot digital camera with a digital viewfinder, a backup 'iron-sight', and flash.  You can look at your photos on the digital screen, or transfer them with any standard electronic device. This one can be worn over your neck.

A 35 mm digital SLR (single-lens reflex) camera with optical and digital viewfinders, a zoom lens with auto-focus and stabilizer, and flash.  You can look at your photos on the digital screen or transfer them with any standard electronic device.  Before the Cataclysm, you could have taken professional-grade photos using this. This one can be worn over your neck
An LED headlamp with an adjustable strap so as to be comfortably worn on your head or attached to your helmet.  It is turned on, and continually draining batteries.  Use it to turn it off.
A very dim lamp powered by the magic of nuclear decay.  It's a bit bulkier than your average headlamp, but can be worn like one just the same.  Use it to close the cover and hide the light.

A small, very dim lamp powered by the magic of nuclear decay.  The adjustable strap allows it to be comfortably worn on your head or attached to your helmet.  Use it to open the cover and shed some light.
A pair of compact augmented reality glasses with some basic functionality.  There is a camera on the rim, and it has an alarm clock feature.

An expensive model of augmented reality glasses designed with adaptive light correction and some gadgets.  An augmented reality overlay allows the user to zoom their view and display handy information about local topology.

An armored, electronically-shielded helmet containing a camera, a two-way radio, and a headlamp, all of which can be voice-activated for redundancy.  It is designed to protect against overpressure, fragmentation, impact, and heat.
//: Based on the EOD 10 and EOD 9 helmets.

description: A featureless, disc-shaped device mounted on a harness.  The words "5-point anchor" are inscribed on its front and back.

use_action.msg: An LED light in the %s flickers on.
use_action.need_charges_msg: It seems like this device needs power.

description: The harness's shoulder-mounted LED glows with a soft green hue.  There's no further indication of anything happening.
A battered disc-shaped device mounted on a harness.  The words "5-point anchor" are inscribed on its front and back.

use_action.msg: The %s emits a low-pitched clicking alarm as its mounted LED light flashes yellow.
use_action.need_charges_msg: It seems like this device needs power.

description: Covered in interlocking plates of reflective metal, this advanced suit resembles an astronaut's space suit.  Use it to turn it on.

use_action.msg:
Initiating
Running suit integrity diagnosticsâ€¦
All systems operational.
use_action.need_charges_msg: Warning: Operating on minimal power.  Protection compromised.

description: Covered in interlocking plates of reflective metal, this advanced suit resembles both plate armor and an astronaut's spacesuit.  It is turned on, and continually draining power.  Use it to turn it off.
A mask worn over your mouth which, when loaded with the proper filters, recycles your exhaled breath for rebreathing while underwater.  Use it to turn it on.

A mask worn over your mouth which, when loaded with the proper filters, recycles your exhaled breath for rebreathing while underwater.  It is turned on, and continually consuming its filter.  Use it to turn it off.

A mask worn over your mouth which, when loaded with the proper filters, recycles your exhaled breath for rebreathing while underwater.  This model has been expanded substantially and can accommodate exotic anatomy.  Use it to turn it on.

A mask worn over your mouth which, when loaded with the proper filters, recycles your exhaled breath for rebreathing while underwater.  This model has been expanded substantially and can accommodate exotic anatomy.  It is turned on, and continually consuming its filter.  Use it to turn it off.

A mask worn over your mouth which, when loaded with the proper filters, recycles your exhaled breath for rebreathing while underwater.  This model has been shrunk dramatically to fit a smaller face.  Use it to turn it on.

A mask worn over your mouth which, when loaded with the proper filters, recycles your exhaled breath for rebreathing while underwater.  This model has been shrunk dramatically to fit a smaller face.  It is turned on, and continually consuming its filter.  Use it to turn it off.
A mask that straps over your mouth and nose and filters air.  Protects from smoke, dust, and other contaminants quite well.  It must be prepared before use.
A full gas mask that covers the face and eyes.  Provides excellent protection from smoke, tear gas, and other contaminants.  It must be prepared before use.
A rather roomy mask with filters attached, designed to accommodate exotic anatomy.  Provides excellent protection from smoke, tear gas, and other contaminants.  It must be prepared before use.
A rather small gas mask that covers the face and eyes.  Provides excellent protection from smoke, tear gas, and other contaminants.  It must be prepared before use.

A lightweight, form-fitting mask that straps over your mouth and nose, providing full protection from the inhalation of smoke, tear gas, and chemical contaminants - though safety goggles are advised!  It must be prepared before use.
A custom-made leather gasmask faced with Nomex.  It must be prepared before use.
A full-face mask commonly used by firefighters.  The protective breathing apparatus provides excellent protection from smoke, flame, and other dangers.  It must be prepared before use.
A gas mask handcrafted from treated leather with a steel faceplate overtop.  It must be prepared before use.
A half-face gasmask handcrafted from treated leather.  It provides no protection for the eyes, and must be activated before use.
A gas mask handcrafted from treated leather.  It must be prepared before use.
A pair of battery-powered goggles that use a infrared LED in conjunction with a IR camera, allowing you to see in the dark.  Use it to turn them on.

A pair of battery-powered goggles that use a infrared LED in conjunction with a IR camera, allowing you to see in the dark.  It is turned on, and continually draining batteries.  Use it to turn them off.
//: 2019 commercial models can operate at under 0.375W with the IR illuminator on

description: A pair of battery-powered goggles that grant infrared vision, allowing you to see warm-blooded creatures in the dark.  Use it to turn them on.
A pair of battery-powered goggles that grant infrared vision, allowing you to see warm-blooded creatures in the dark.  Use it to turn them off.
A modified RX12 jet injector which can be worn on the body.  A label on the side warns against using more than two doses per hour.

A Rivtech RX11 stimulant delivery system, a jet autoinjector system worn on the user's body.  A simple press of its activator injects powerful chemical stimulants into the bloodstream without using a needle.
A custom-built, armored rebreather mask that covers the face and eyes.  Provides excellent protection from harm as well providing breathing gas while underwater.  Use it to turn it on.

A custom-built, armored rebreather mask that covers the face and eyes.  Provides excellent protection from harm as well providing breathing gas while underwater.  It is turned on, and continually consuming its filter.  Use it to turn it off.
A custom-built, armored rebreather mask that covers the face and eyes.  Provides excellent protection from harm as well providing breathing gas while underwater.  Use it to turn it on.
A custom-built, armored rebreather mask that covers the face and eyes.  Provides excellent protection from harm as well providing breathing gas while underwater.  Use it to turn it on.

A custom-built, armored rebreather mask that covers the face and eyes regardless of your state of mutation.  Provides excellent protection from harm as well providing breathing gas while underwater.  It is turned on, and continually consuming its filter.  Use it to turn it off.
A custom-built, armored rebreather mask that covers the face and eyes.  Provides excellent protection from harm as well providing breathing gas while underwater.  Use it to turn it on.
A plain hairpin to keep your hair in place.
A pink hairpin with cute flower textures.

A large, fluffy towel.  It could be used to dry yourself.  Any person that can travel the length and breadth of the apocalypse, rough it, slum it, struggle against terrible odds, win through, and still know where their towel is, is clearly a force to be reckoned with.
A large, sopping wet towel.  If you wait a little bit, it should dry out.  Don't panic.
A straw fedora hat, comfortable and stylish.  Its brim helps keep the sun out of your eyes.
A tasteful wool turtleneck, modeled after cashmere.  Unencumbering and warm, but lacking storage.
A tasteful shirt with a high rolled collar.  It's too thin to be called a sweater.

use_action.msg: You adjust your ski mask for less warmth.

description: A warm wool mask that protects the head and face from the cold.  It covers most of your head and mouth, and can be adjusted to hang around your throat instead.

use_action.msg: You adjust your ski mask for more warmth.

description: A warm wool mask that protects the head and face from the cold.  It is wrapped around your throat, and can be adjusted to cover your mouth and more of your head.
A simple metal whistle, with a cord to wear it around your neck.

A pair of earmuffs favored by shooters.  Without batteries or when turned off, they function like normal earmuffs and block all sound.  They will only block sounds over a certain decibel amount when turned on, to protect your ears from injury while otherwise allowing you to hear normally.  The earmuffs are currently off.
A pair of earmuffs favored by shooters.  The earmuffs are turned on, and will block sounds over a certain decibel amount while otherwise allowing you to hear normally.
//: 3M Peltors claim to go 100 hours on 2 AAs

description: A pair of in-ear drivers designed to dampen loud sounds and amplify quiet sounds.  Without batteries or when turned off, they function like normal earplugs and block most sound.  They will only block sounds over a certain decibel amount when turned on, to protect your ears from injury while otherwise allowing you to hear normally.  The earplugs are currently off.

A pair of in-ear drivers designed to dampen loud sounds and amplify quiet sounds.  The earplugs are turned on, and will block sounds over a certain decibel amount while otherwise allowing you to hear normally.
//: same power draw as the earmuffs, much smaller internal battery

description: A medical listening tool.  Use it to listen to things.  Closely.
A relatively cumbersome DIY child's medical listening toy.  Use it to listen to things.  Closely.
A riot helmet with a plastic face shield that covers your entire face.  Activate to raise the face shield.
A riot helmet with a plastic face shield, which is raised up.  Activate to lower the shield.
A popular German helmet of the late medieval era, the sallet covers the head and eyes.  Activate it to toggle the visor.
A popular German helmet of the late medieval era, the sallet covers the head and eyes.  Activate it to toggle the visor.

use_action.msg: You lower the sallet visor over your eyes.

description: An iconic knightly helm of the late Middle Ages.  When you think of a knight's helmet, it looks something like this.  Activate it to toggle the visor.
An iconic knightly helm of the late Middle Ages.  When you think of a knight's helmet, it looks something like this.  Activate it to toggle the visor.

A high-pressure 232 bar diving tank that can contain up to 12 L of a compressed mixture of oxygen and nitrogen.  It is equipped with an on-demand regulator and a mouthpiece designed mostly for underwater use.

A high-pressure 232 bar diving tank that can contain up to 12 L of a compressed mixture of oxygen and nitrogen.  It is equipped with an on-demand regulator and a mouthpiece designed mostly for underwater use.

A small, high-pressure 200 bar backup diving tank that can contain 4 L of a compressed mixture of oxygen and nitrogen.  It is equipped with an on-demand regulator and a mouthpiece designed mostly for underwater use.

A small, high-pressure 200 bar backup diving tank that can contain 4 L of a compressed mixture of oxygen and nitrogen.  It is equipped with an on-demand regulator and a mouthpiece designed mostly for underwater use.
A heated blanket made of polyester.  Its power drain is usually negligible, but without being able to plug it into a wall, it chews through batteries insanely quickly.

use_action.msg: You turn the blanket's heating elements on.

description: A polyester blanket with an electric heating unit inside.  It's turned on, making it nice and toasty while it lasts.

use_action.msg: You turn the blanket's heating elements off.

description: A pair of industrial-grade ear plugs attached together by some string.  They are inside your ears, activate them to take them out.

use_action.msg: You take the ear plugs out.

description: A pair of industrial-grade ear plugs, they are attached together by some string.  They hang around your neck, use them to plug them in.
A pair of makeshift ear plugs made from lumps of wax on the ends of a piece of string.  They are inside your ears, activate them to take them out.

use_action.msg: You take the ear plugs out.

description: A pair of makeshift ear plugs made from lumps of wax on the ends of a piece of string.  They hang around your neck, use them to plug them in.
A military flight helmet.  Equipped with a visor, microphone, and noise dampening system.  The helmet is also fitted with plastic rails to allow for different load-outs.

use_action.msg: You turn the flight helmet on.

pocket_data.description: Pocket for a front night vision attachment.

description: A military flight helmet with various LED devices blinking periodically.  Equipped with a visor, microphone, and noise dampening system.  The helmet is also fitted with plastic rails to allow for different load-outs.

use_action.msg: You bring your hand to your cover and issue a salute.

description: A military officer's combo cover, or peaked cap.  It conveys an air of authority, while keeping the sun out of your eyes.
